src: A classic gray plaid blazer with black buttons, featuring a notched lapel and two front flaps. The blazer is slightly oversized, with a checkered pattern throughout, in shades of gray and subtle red lines.
edit: A two-tone leather jacket combining sleek black and crisp white leather panels. The jacket features contrasting zippers and a tailored fit, with shiny metallic details adding a modern touch.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object is angled to the side, with one arm slightly bent, and is set against a plain white background with a light shadow on the wall.
per_image_non_shared_src.laura-chouette-Pv3DjB4Q7nk-unsplash: The object is captured front-facing, with both hands crossed in front, set against a plain white wall, creating a minimalist and clean atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_src.laura-chouette-S5xwY7iGGZo-unsplash: The object is shown slightly angled, both arms crossed in front, against a simple white backdrop that includes the partial view of a white chair in the corner.
per_image_non_shared_src.laura-chouette-W6N869esmYM-unsplash: The object is in a close-up shot, both hands gripping the front edges, with a wavy hairstyle visible, set against a seamless white background.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object is angled to the side, with one arm slightly bent, set against a pink-themed background with soft pink lighting casting shadows.
per_image_non_shared_edit.laura-chouette-Pv3DjB4Q7nk-unsplash: The object is captured front-facing, with both hands crossed in front, set against a pink background that creates a colorful and vibrant atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_edit.laura-chouette-S5xwY7iGGZo-unsplash: The object is shown slightly angled, both arms crossed in front, against a simple pink backdrop with a chair now appearing in a matching pink hue.
per_image_non_shared_edit.laura-chouette-W6N869esmYM-unsplash: The object is in a close-up shot, both hands gripping the front edges, with a wavy hairstyle visible, set against a seamless pink background.
